title: Eco-pack
description: A modpack for venuscord and friends!
body: A fun modpack with a balance of things for venuscord and friends. One which looks to fulfill a niche for everyone, from extensive farming and building blocks which allow for cute building. To automation and machine creation with tech mods in the form of Industrial Revolution, Tech Reborn and Create. To an improvement to player customization and progression with PlayerEx, the Eco-Pack looks to provide a more complex minecraft experience while keeping in mind performance for lower-end machines.
